description: Output of the planning phase. Produced by the planner model from the task brief.

fields.problem_restatement: Precise restatement of the task goal in implementation terms
fields.scope_boundary: Explicit statement of what is and is not in scope
fields.constraints_analysis: Each constraint from the task brief, with implications for implementation
fields.data_model: Key data structures, schemas, or state transitions involved
fields.component_breakdown: Implementation components with responsibilities and interfaces
fields.dependencies: Existing code/files this implementation depends on or must not break
fields.open_questions: Unresolved ambiguities that the executor should surface, not guess
fields.execution_notes: Guidance specific to the target execution model
